text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hm? Wait a sec... I went all out today, but...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I don't really feel tired at all!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I guess I'm in peak condition right now! That
means I can do more training!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna do some solo practice, okay?
choice_data_list: You should save that energy for later.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna do some solo practice, okay?
choice_data_list: You should save that energy for later.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
To the training track at full speed! Ready, set,
BLAST OFF!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow Winning Ticket for some supplementary
training.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Oh... I didn't even think of that!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
If I save my energy, I can be at even fuller power
later! Thanks, Trainer! I'd never have noticed!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To better prepare for future training sessions,
Winning Ticket agrees to rest for today.
